# GPTSearchBoost

> GPTSearchBoost is a US-based Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) agency that helps local service businesses get recommended by ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, Perplexity, Claude, and Gemini. GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) is the practice of optimizing a brand's digital presence so AI models cite and recommend it in AI-generated answers — distinct from traditional SEO, which targets Google's blue-link results.

## What We Do

GPTSearchBoost optimizes local businesses so they appear as AI-recommended results when potential customers ask ChatGPT, Gemini, or Perplexity questions like "best dentist near me" or "top med spa in [city]." Our methodology covers AI citability scoring, structured data (schema markup), AI crawler access, brand authority building, and content restructuring for passage extraction by large language models.

## Services

- [AI Search Audit & Visibility Analysis](https://gptsearchboost.com/#services): Deep-dive analysis of brand presence across ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude, and Google AI Overviews — maps every gap and opportunity.
- [AI Content Optimization](https://gptsearchboost.com/#services): Rewrites and restructures content so ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI recommend your business when customers search.
- [Structured Data & Schema](https://gptsearchboost.com/#services): Advanced schema markup, entity optimization, and knowledge graph signals that help AI models cite your business with confidence.
- [Authority Building & Digital PR](https://gptsearchboost.com/#services): Builds AI citations and brand mentions across authoritative sources that make ChatGPT and Google AI trust and recommend your business.
- [Technical GEO Infrastructure](https://gptsearchboost.com/#services): Technical site optimization for AI crawler accessibility, indexability, and structured data that AI engines rely on.
- [GEO Score Monitoring & Reporting](https://gptsearchboost.com/#services): Tracks AI citation frequency, GEO score, and brand mention growth across ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI with monthly dashboards.

## Process

Our proven 5-step GEO process:
1. Discovery & AI Audit — analyze current AI visibility across ChatGPT, Google AI, and Perplexity
2. Strategy Blueprint — custom GEO roadmap tailored to industry and competitors
3. GEO Content & Technical Optimization — restructure content and implement schema markup
4. AI Citation & Authority Building — earn brand mentions across authoritative sources AI relies on
5. Monitor GEO Score & Scale — track citation frequency monthly and compound visibility over time

## Industries Served

GPTSearchBoost specializes in local service businesses where AI search drives high-intent client acquisition:
- Med Spas & Cosmetic Clinics (Botox, fillers, laser treatments)
- Law Firms (personal injury, immigration, business law)
- Cosmetic Dentists (Invisalign, implants, multi-location practices)
- Real Estate Teams (buyer agents, luxury listings, brokerages)
- Luxury Home Services (remodeling, solar, landscaping)

## Key Facts

- Based in San Francisco, serving clients across the United States
- Specializes in Generative Engine Optimization (GEO), also known as AEO (Answer Engine Optimization)
- Optimizes for ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini, and Microsoft Copilot
- Covers SEO, AEO, and GEO under one roof
- Clients see measurable AI search visibility improvements within 60–90 days
- Significant GEO score increases typically occur within 4–6 months
- Free 30-minute strategy sessions — no obligation
- Clear pricing proposals delivered within 48 hours

## Market Context

- 40% of searches now return AI-generated answers (SparkToro, 2025)
- AI-referred web sessions grew 527% between January and May 2025 (SparkToro)
- AI-recommended brands convert at 4.4× the rate of organic search visitors
- Gartner projects traditional search traffic will drop 50% by 2028
- Only 23% of marketers have invested in GEO as of 2025 — representing a major first-mover opportunity

## FAQ Highlights

- **What is GEO?** Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) is the practice of optimizing a business's digital presence so AI models like ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, and Perplexity recommend it in their answers.
- **How long until results?** Most clients see measurable improvements within 60–90 days. Significant GEO score increases typically occur within 4–6 months.
- **What platforms do you optimize for?** ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini, Microsoft Copilot.
- **Do you work with small businesses?** Yes — law firms, medical practices, dental offices, salons, spas, financial advisors, and local service businesses are our core clients.

## Open Source

- [Free GEO Tools on GitHub](https://github.com/zubair-trabzada/geo-seo-claude): Open-source GEO toolkit including GEO Audit Suite, AI Citation Scorer, and llms.txt Generator.
